sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports experiencing persistent fatigue and muscle aches for the past three weeks. He states the fatigue is significantly worse on days when he has not been sleeping well. He denies fever, cough, or shortness of breath. He also reports feeling slightly depressed.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 128/80 mmHg. Heart rate is 72 bpm and regular. Temperature is 98.6°F. Range of motion in all major joints is full and pain-free. No swelling or redness noted.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are most consistent with chronic fatigue syndrome and possible depression.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Rescribe sertraline 50mg daily. Schedule follow-up in 4 weeks to assess response to medication and monitor fatigue levels. Counsel the patient on sleep hygiene and stress management techniques.
